calcite.logical:
LogicalSystemLimit(fetch=[10000], type=[QUERY_SIZE_LIMIT])
  LogicalProject(avg(balance)=[$1], state=[$0])
    LogicalAggregate(group=[{0}], avg(balance)=[AVG($1)])
      LogicalProject(state=[$7], balance=[$3])
        LogicalSort(sort0=[$3], sort1=[$8], dir0=[ASC-nulls-first], dir1=[ASC-nulls-first])
          CalciteLogicalIndexScan(table=[[OpenSearch, opensearch-sql_test_index_account]])
calcite.physical:
EnumerableLimit(fetch=[10000])
  EnumerableCalc(expr#0..1=[{inputs}], avg(balance)=[$t1], state=[$t0])
    EnumerableAggregate(group=[{7}], avg(balance)=[AVG($3)])
      CalciteEnumerableIndexScan(table=[[OpenSearch, opensearch-sql_test_index_account]])
